title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 217.043 - United States government, contract powers of department
text:
217.043.  United States government, contract powers of department. — The department of corrections is authorized to contract with the United States or any other state to provide custody and housing within the department for offenders convicted and sentenced to a prison term.
(L. 1989 H.B. 128, et al. § 2, A.L. 1995 H.B. 424)
